title: Art with a heart on display 13 to 16 December
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Dana Bay's Mandie...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Gallery","html":"Gallery"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Dana Bay's Mandie Crous is creative in so many areas, the mind boggles.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Dana Bay's Mandie Crous is creative in so many areas, the mind boggles."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She is proficient at crochet, needlepoint, decou-page, painting in different media and on different surfaces and many other crafts.","html":"She is proficient at crochet, needlepoint, decou-page, painting in different media and on different surfaces and many other crafts."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"She also gives art lessons at her Dana Bay home, which also houses her Lifestyle and Art Gallery."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Her home is full of her handiwork and she spends many hours busy on one or a number of projects.","html":"Her home is full of her handiwork and she spends many hours busy on one or a number of projects."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"See a gallery by clicking below:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Art exhibition 13 to 16 December","html":"Art exhibition 13 to 16 December"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Besides this, she has the most beautiful, verdant garden.","html":"Besides this, she has the most beautiful, verdant garden."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Her plants grow beautifully and are greener and larger than usual.","html":"Her plants grow beautifully and are greener and larger than usual."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"While walking through her garden, she will let you into her secrets: she does this or that, to make plants grow so well.","html":"While walking through her garden, she will let you into her secrets: she does this or that, to make plants grow so well."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"You will hear a bit of the history of the plants and how she has applied techniques and principles to deliver a marvellous display.","html":"You will hear a bit of the history of the plants and how she has applied techniques and principles to deliver a marvellous display."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Exhibition 13 to 16 December"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mandie is hosting an exhibition of arts and crafts in her home and garden in Dana Bay from 13 to 16 December.","html":"Mandie is hosting an exhibition of arts and crafts in her home and garden in Dana Bay from 13 to 16 December."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She is helping a number of artists by exhibiting their work and she also ensures she supports South African crafters, displaying a huge variety of crafts of all types.","html":"She is helping a number of artists by exhibiting their work and she also ensures she supports South African crafters, displaying a huge variety of crafts of all types."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Generous-hearted Mandie is even giving away a painting in a lucky draw."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"You don't have to buy a raffle ticket.","html":"You don't have to buy a raffle ticket."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Each invitation has a unique number and you supply that number to have a chance to win.","html":"Each invitation has a unique number and you supply that number to have a chance to win."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"People must book to see the exhibition from 13 to 16 December.","html":"People must book to see the exhibition from 13 to 16 December."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Contact Mandie (082 819 2173) or Corlia (083 259 8260) for more information and to book.","html":"Contact Mandie (082 819 2173) or Corlia (083 259 8260) for more information and to book."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Below are some of the works which will be on display."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
